name: tasker-api
description: AI Agent Skill for interacting with SocialSeed Tasker REST API v0.8.0

quality_guide.description: Best practices for creating quality issues in client projects

functions.name: create_component
functions.description: Create a new component to group issues

functions.name: list_components
functions.description: List components with optional filters

functions.name: get_component
functions.description: Get full details of a single component

functions.name: update_component
functions.description: Update component fields

functions.name: delete_component
functions.description: Delete a component and all associated issues

functions.name: create_issue
functions.description: Create a new issue

functions.name: list_issues
functions.description: List issues with filters and pagination

functions.name: get_issue
functions.description: Get full details of a single issue

functions.name: update_issue
functions.description: Update issue fields (status, priority, description, labels, agent_working)

functions.name: close_issue
functions.description: Close an issue (validates no open dependencies)

functions.name: delete_issue
functions.description: Permanently delete an issue

functions.name: get_workable_issues
functions.description: Get issues where all dependencies are closed (ready to work on)

functions.name: add_dependency
functions.description: Create a DEPENDS_ON relationship between two issues

functions.name: remove_dependency
functions.description: Remove a DEPENDS_ON relationship

functions.name: get_dependencies
functions.description: List issues that the given issue depends on

functions.name: get_dependency_chain
functions.description: Get the full transitive dependency chain for an issue

functions.name: get_blocked_issues
functions.description: List all issues blocked by open dependencies

functions.name: get_dependency_graph
functions.description: Get full dependency graph for visualization

functions.name: analyze_impact
functions.description: Analyze downstream impact of an issue

functions.name: analyze_component_impact
functions.description: Analyze impact for a component

functions.name: analyze_root_cause
functions.description: Find likely root causes for a test failure

functions.name: get_project_summary
functions.description: Get complete project summary dashboard

functions.name: health_check
functions.description: Check API and Neo4j health

functions.name: admin_reset
functions.description: Reset data (all, issues, or components)

functions.name: get_sync_status
functions.description: Get GitHub sync status

functions.name: get_sync_queue
functions.description: Get pending sync queue items

functions.name: force_sync
functions.description: Force GitHub sync attempt

functions.name: test_webhook
functions.description: Test webhook configuration
